title: How to count how many times a value appears in a range
task: Count the number of cells in a range that exactly match a given value.
keywords: count how many times a value appears excel
how many times does a value appear

excel.note: COUNTIF counts cells equal to the criterion.

explanation: COUNTIF(range, criterion) returns how many cells in the range match the criterion. Here 'apple' appears in A2, A4 and A6, so the result is 3. Use a cell reference (e.g. =COUNTIF(A2:A7,C1)) to make the searched value dynamic.
